mapper.sql: id, category, type_label, title, content, points_json, important, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM app_illustration_notice
ORDER BY important DESC, sort_order ASC, created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM app_illustration_notice WHERE deleted = 0 AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY important DESC, sort_order ASC, created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM app_illustration_notice WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_illustration_notice SET category = #{category}, type_label = #{typeLabel}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, points_json = #{pointsJson}, important = #{important}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
